text: Entering this space, awash in sharp colors and glass, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The environment feels meticulously curated, almost clinical in its brightness. The presence of the 'R+D' sign and the accompanying text about human-machine interaction makes me ponder the boundaries of creativity—are we creators, or are we part of a system constantly creating us as well? I feel small, observant, and quietly energized by the hum of innovation in the air.
